name: Sera, Emily, and Sir P | Christmas
description: This is the three of them. I felt guilty after not putting Sir Pentiouse in the last bot. So here he is. Also Emily and Sera. I don’t know if I had to age Emily up but, I did. Just in case, I don’t really read the wiki or whatever. I just watch the thingy and let other creator’s bots lead and show me how it’s done.
creator: The Car Mobiles
